query:
SELECT id, externalId, name, businessName, status, serviceCount, siteAddress FROM customers
WHERE name LIKE '%BLACKBEAUTY%' OR name LIKE '%BLACK BEAUTY%' OR siteAddress LIKE '%BLACKBEAUTY%' OR siteAddress LIKE '%BLACK BEAUTY%' OR siteAddress LIKE '%KENSINGTON%';

id	externalId	name	businessName	status	serviceCount	siteAddress

268	C0172	Noma Themba		active	0	31 Blackbeauty Court, Kensington, Queensland, Australia, 4670
